info.name: FoodHub API
info.description: REST API for restaurant, menu and user management.

request.description: Returns a user using its unique identifier.

response.name: User found

request.description: Updates the information of an existing user.

response.name: User successfully updated
User or user type not found

request.description: Deletes a user by its unique identifier.
Returns all registered users.

response.name: Users successfully returned

body.raw:
{
  "address": "123 Main Street, São Paulo - SP",
  "email": "junior@foodhub.com",
  "name": "Geová Junior",
  "password": "StrongPassword123",
  "userTypeId": "22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222"
}

request.description: Returns a specific user type using its identifier.
Updates the information of an existing user type.
Deletes a user type by its identifier.
Returns all registered user types.
Creates a new user type.
Returns a restaurant using its unique identifier.

response.name: Restaurant found
response.body:
{
  "id": "dddddddd-dddd-dddd-dddd-dddddddddddd",
  "name": "Pizzaria Napoli",
  "address": "Av. Paulista, 1000 - São Paulo/SP",
  "kitchenType": "ITALIAN",
  "openingTime": "08:00",
  "closingTime": "22:00",
  "ownerName": "Geová Junior",
  "menuItems": [
    {
      "id": "ffffffff-ffff-ffff-ffff-ffffffffffff",
      "name": "Cheeseburger",
      "description": "Beef burger with cheddar cheese, lettuce and tomato.",
      "price": 738.4105480310988,
      "availableOnlyInRestaurant": true,
      "imagePath": "/images/menu-items/cheeseburger.png"
    },
    {
      "id": "ffffffff-ffff-ffff-ffff-ffffffffffff",
      "name": "Cheeseburger",
      "description": "Beef burger with cheddar cheese, lettuce and tomato.",
      "price": 2207.988628539681,
      "availableOnlyInRestaurant": true,
      "imagePath": "/images/menu-items/cheeseburger.png"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Returns a kitchen type using its unique identifier.

Creates a new kitchen type.
